Home»Lifestyle»Celeb News»International Celebs»Jin of BTS to shine as torchbearer in Paris Olympics

Jin, the eldest member of BTS, will be an Olympic torchbearer at the Paris Olympics after completing his mandatory military service.

In an exciting turn of events, Jin, the eldest member of BTS, is set to be an Olympic torchbearer at the Paris Olympics.

Fresh from completing his mandatory military service, the 31-year-old star is ready to represent South Korea in this prestigious role.

This news has delighted fans worldwide.

The singer, also known as Kim Seok-jin, finished his 18-month military service last month, according toAP News.

He is now poised to carry the Olympic torch, symbolising “harmony” and “peace” as he goes.

“It’s an honour to be chosen as a torchbearer,” Jin said. “I hope to spread a message of unity through this opportunity.”

The torch relay, which started in April, will see Jin and other torchbearers visit various historic sites in the host country.

While the specific schedule remains under wraps, the excitement is palpable.

Fans eagerly await to see their favourite singer in this new light, according toPeople.

Jin’s journey in the military began in late 2022.

He entered a front-line South Korean military boot camp, marking the start of his service.

Despite the challenges, Jin emerged stronger and more determined.

His fellow BTS members, includingJung Kook, V, Jimin, Suga, RM, and J-Hope, are currently fulfilling their military duties.

The day after his release from military duty, Jin wasted no time in reuniting with his fans.

He hosted the annual BTS debut anniversary celebration, FESTA, in Seoul, according toCNN.

The event was a grand affair, filled with activities like trying out different foods, performances, and dance challenges.

“It was wonderful to be back with the ARMY,” Jin said, referring to the BTS fan base. “Their support means everything to me.”

Being an Olympic torchbearer is a significant honour.

The torch relay is a tradition that dates back to the ancient Olympics in Greece. It symbolises the light of spirit, knowledge, and life.

The singer’s participation adds a modern twist to this age-old tradition. His involvement brings global attention to the event, thanks to BTS’s massive fanbase.

The decision to include Jin in the torch relay highlights the influence of K-pop on global culture.

BTS has broken numerous records and barriers, bringing Korean music to an international audience.

Their impact is undeniable, and Jin’s role as a torchbearer is a testament to this.

Fans have taken to social media to express their excitement.

“Jin is going to shine as a torchbearer!” tweeted one fan. “So proud of our Worldwide Handsome!” said another, using Jin’s popular nickname.

The buzz on social media continues to grow, with hashtags like #JinOlympicTorchbearer trending worldwide.

The Olympic Games are not just about sports; they are about unity and peace.

The singer’s participation embodies these values. His journey from a global pop star to a military serviceman, and now an Olympic torchbearer, is inspiring.

“I want to show that no matter where we come from, we can all unite for a common goal,” Jin said.

Jin’s role as an Olympic torchbearer is a momentous occasion. It bridges the gap between cultures and brings people together.

As we await the Paris Olympics, one thing is certain: Jin will carry the torch with pride and grace, lighting the way for a brighter future.

title: Jin of BTS to shine as torchbearer in Paris Olympics
author: Precious Simpasa
description: Jin, the eldest member of BTS, will be an Olympic torchbearer at the Paris Olympics after completing his mandatory military service.
